purpose: Durable no-fetch control-plane ledger for S0 FINRA/OCC rows that are source-ready by daily market data but need explicit universe mapping, symbol normalization, or null-evidence semantics before flow/options proxy metrics can be required.

service_boundary.reason: Plain US FINRA/OCC denominators are source-ready; US_CLASS/non-plain rows remain daily source-ready through YF/market facts and are tracked here as mapping policy work.
service_boundary.public_scoring_claim: S0 daily source readiness can be true without fabricating FINRA/OCC metrics for non-plain rows.

action_policy.rule: Existing daily market data must be connected first. FINRA/OCC proxy metrics are required only after reviewed ticker/listing/underlying mappings exist.
No reported FINRA row or no listed OCC options can satisfy source readiness, but proxy scores remain null/zero-evidence instead of fabricated activity.
Keep this ledger local/admin until a reviewed public explanation surface is designed.

finra_source_ready_no_reported_row.company: Bank of New York Mellon Corp

occ_no_listed_options_source_ready.company: Bank of New York Mellon Corp
